options.name: --solutions
options.description:
Target solutions for checking. If
not specified, all solutions in
the working directory will be
analyzed.

options.name: --excluded
options.description:
Package IDs that will be skipped
during checking.

options.name: --excludedVersionsRegex
options.description:
A regular expression to match
package versions that will be
skipped during checking.

options.name: --directoryBuildProps
options.description:
(Default: true) Take
Directory.Build.props files into
account

options.name: --reportOverridenDirectoryBuildProps
options.description:
(Default: true) Report when csproj
overrides a Directory.Build.props
